api_key.description: Concord API key, sent as the X-API-KEY header. Never logged.

base_url.description: Concord API base URL. Defaults to the production environment; override with https://uat.concordnow.com/api/rest/1 for UAT, or a test/proxy URL.

organization_id.description: Concord organization id; required for every organization-scoped stream (agreements, folders, reports, organization, clauses, approvals, groups, members, events, subscription, branding, automated_templates, folder, folder_agreements, report, clause, approval, agreement and its sub-resource streams).

folder_id.description: Concord folder id; required for the folder and folder_agreements detail streams.

agreement_uid.description: Concord agreement uid; required for the agreement detail stream and its sub-resource streams (agreement_metadata, agreement_summary, agreement_comments, agreement_activities, agreement_members, agreement_versions, agreement_attachments) when read standalone rather than via fan_out from the agreements stream.

report_id.description: Concord report id (or sample report enum value); required for the report detail stream.

clause_id.description: Concord clause id; required for the clause detail stream.

approval_id.description: Concord approval id; required for the approval detail stream.

events_start_date.description: Events stream date-range start (yyyy-MM-dd); required for the events stream. Concord requires start/end to span at most 7 days.

events_end_date.description: Events stream date-range end (yyyy-MM-dd); required for the events stream. Concord requires start/end to span at most 7 days.

clauses_page_size.description: Records per page (limit query param) for the clauses stream's offset/limit pagination.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
